content_markdown:
# "Luminous Pathways in the Cosmos"
## Scripture
"For the Lord your God is God of gods and Lord of lords, the great God, mighty and awesome, who shows no partiality and accepts no bribes. He defends the cause of the fatherless and the widow, and loves the foreigner residing among you, giving them food and clothing." - Deuteronomy 10:17-18

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial pathways that crisscross our universe. The Milky Way, a luminous ribbon of stars, stretches across the heavens, guiding our eyes to the majesty of God's creation. Just as the stars light the way for travelers in the physical world, God's love and care illuminate our spiritual journey. He shows no partiality, defending the vulnerable and loving the stranger, demonstrating a profound commitment to justice and compassion.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the luminous pathways in the cosmos, we're humbled by Your greatness and might. Help us to reflect Your love and care for all people, especially the marginalized and the foreigner among us. May Your light guide us on our own spiritual journey, as we strive to follow Your footsteps and defend the cause of those in need. Thank You for the celestial reminders of Your majesty and love. Amen.
